screen.name: screen1
screen.instruct: We need to take a sample of the burned wood flooring to analyze in the lab for ignitable liquids. First, use the chisel to loosen up some wood chips in the puddle-shaped area.
screen.label: Puddle sample

screen.name: screen2
screen.instruct: Now use the tweezers to put the loose wood chips into the can.
screen.label: Puddle sample

screen.name: screen3
screen.instruct: This special can is air tight and has an activated carbon strip attached to the lid. This strip will have an important role later in the lab when we analyze the evidence. Now, close the container.
screen.label: Puddle sample

screen.name: screen4
screen.instruct: Next, we need to take a control sample from an area that is not burned. Again, use the chisel to loosen up some wood chips.
screen.label: Control sample

screen.name: screen5
screen.instruct: Now use the tweezers to put the loose wood chips into the can.
screen.label: Control sample
